subcodes.first_line: Praise, sanctified above the attributes of all peoples, befitteth the Ancient Lord, Who from mines and mountain repositories bringeth forth copper [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: حمد مقدس از اوصاف امم مالک قدم را لایق و سزاست که از معادن و کان جبال نحاس
subcodes.subjects: @honesty; truthfulness; trustworthiness, @business; financial; property matters, @consolation and comfort, @consultation, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God
